group.name: AWS SBG at NUCES - FAST Peshawar

upcoming.title: AWS Student Community Day FAST Peshawar 2026
upcoming.venueName: National University of Computer & Emerging Sciences - FAST Peshawar Campus
upcoming.description: Students and developers meet at FAST Peshawar for AWS talks, demos, networking, food, and giveaways. Sessions cover cloud, DevOps, AI, backend systems, and career guidance.

past.title: How Startups Go Live on AWS: From Code to Production (The Right Way)
past.description: Students learn a release path on AWS Elastic Beanstalk. The session covers AWS deployment, code-to-production steps, a live demo, and Q&A.

past.title: Getting Started with Cloud & Kubernetes: Insights from Andy Suderman
past.description: Andy Suderman, CTO and co-founder of Fairwinds, discusses cloud careers, Kubernetes mistakes, cost control, open-source tools, and engineering leadership.

past.title: AWS Cloud Club Fast Peshawar Orientation – Learn, Network & Win Goodies!
past.venueName: National University of Computer & Emerging Sciences - FAST Peshawar Campus
past.description: Orientation session for AWS Cloud Club FAST Peshawar at FAST NUCES Peshawar. The agenda introduced the core team, event roadmap, learning tracks, certifications, networking, and the group focus on Cloud, AI, and DevOps.

past.title: Introduction to AWS & AWS Cloud Clubs
past.description: Online beginner session with AWS Cloud Club FAST Peshawar and AWS Cloud Club Karachi. Sumama Zaeem covered cloud computing basics, core AWS services, cloud career paths, and certification starting points.
